learning: Use REAL client identities, never fake
Female names with Camille voice only
verify-phone before EVERY call
Use Contact Finder to get real client credentials for companies with good security
If billing dead, try sales line
max_duration 20 min for all calls
Telnyx SIP broken for outbound, use Twilio numbers only
For toll-free targets, must use Twilio numbers
Pages must tell a STORY not list results
Audio player must sync with transcript word-by-word
Send emails PARALLEL with calls, not after
Amerit Fleet all numbers dead - drop target
Amazon requires email/phone/order# - use Contact Finder on real clients
Never use male names with Camille voice
IWS searches by ADDRESS strict match
Planned Companies AR permanently unstaffed
Salesforce billing IVR hangs up - go through sales
Radius asks for SSN on B2B accounts
Voice speed 0.80-0.95, temperature 1.3-1.5, responsiveness 0.5-0.7
Callback technique: reference previous call for credibility
